title: Home
body:
Hi, I’m Vasileios 👋
Welcome to my little corner of the internet. This is where I write about things
I’m working on, learning, or thinking about.
Head over to the blog to read my posts.

title: Hello, World
body:
This is the first post on my new blog, built with Zola
and the Duckquill theme.
To add a new post, create a folder under content/blog/ and put an index.md
inside it with front matter like the block at the top of this file. More to come!
